services.name: Starlink Installation
services.description: Professional Starlink satellite internet installation for residential and commercial properties. Expert mounting, cabling, and network configuration.

services.name: Pre-Wiring & Retrofits
services.description: New construction pre-wiring and retrofit installations for low voltage systems. Structured cabling for future-ready homes and businesses.

services.name: Security Systems
services.description: Residential and commercial security system installation. Alarm systems, motion sensors, and integrated security solutions.
services.label: Residential & Commercial Security Systems

services.name: Surveillance Systems
services.description: CCTV and video surveillance installation for homes and businesses. HD cameras, DVR/NVR setup, and remote viewing configuration.

services.name: Door Access Systems
services.description: Electronic access control systems for commercial and residential properties. Keypad, card reader, and biometric entry solutions.

services.name: Home Theater Systems
services.description: Custom home theater design and installation. Projectors, screens, surround sound, and acoustic optimization.

services.name: Whole House Audio/Visual
services.description: Multi-room audio and video distribution systems. Centralized control and seamless entertainment throughout your home.

services.name: Full Networking Services
services.description: Structured cabling and network infrastructure installation. Ethernet drops, patch panels, and network rack setup.

services.name: Cable Management
services.description: Professional cable organization and cleanup for existing installations. Labeling, routing, and cable concealment.

services.name: Wiring Cleanup
services.description: Existing wiring troubleshooting and organization. Identify and resolve wiring issues, improve system reliability.

services.name: CAT5 & CAT6
services.description: Ethernet cable installation and termination. CAT5e and CAT6 runs for high-speed network connectivity.
